title: Normal > Neutral to Everything
html: Stub. The title Yahir gave to his 2018-12-24 type-chart note. On the surface: a Pokémon-mechanics fact (Normal type takes 1× damage from almost everything). Below the surface: a candidate self-description for late-2018 Yahir — neutral to everything, hits everything for neutral. No advantage, no weakness, no engagement. Worth re-reading next to 2019 08 12 keep things simple and 2019 09 10 low key writing this to end — three notes from the same 2018-2019 emotional register.
